channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-135] e2fsprogs/lfsck needs to work with 2.1 as well as 1.8
item.description:
Update e2fsprogs to be able to build against both b1_8 and master versions of Lustre. Much of this work was done as part of https://bugzilla.lustre.org/show_bug.cgi?id=13698. Cleanup is needed in order to build and run correctly with the upstream e2fsprogs "master" branch (for 1.42).

This will also resolve the "build against installed RPM" problem discussed in LU-45.
item.summary: e2fsprogs/lfsck needs to work with 2.1 as well as 1.8

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: e2fsprogs v1.41.90.wc1 has been built against lustre versions 2.0.59, 1.8.5 and 1.8.1.

Integrated in reviews-e2fsprogs #42
LU-135 Fixes for builds against Lustre 1.8.1 to 2.x.

bruce :
Files :

  • patches/e2fsprogs-lustre_ismounted.patch
